title: Zaslawye Heavy Rain
lead: Zaslawye is experiencing heavy rain with a critical level. The Z-Score of -3.06 indicates a significant anomaly.
body:
The heavy rain in Zaslawye has resulted in a critical level, with a score of 10.0 out of 10. 
 The high humidity of 88% and wind speed of 16.2 km/h are contributing factors. 
 The HDD of 11.7 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG indicate a significant impact on the area.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
